[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000011010 4
1 1000001000 2
2 0011011101 6
3 1111011101 8
4 1000110110 5
5 0010000000 1
6 0100110001 4
7 1011111111 9

45 1111111111 a

70 1101111111 9
